name: My First Big Book of Birds
description:

Sensory skills
Reading and speaking skills

A specially designed book to help children develop visual perception, offering a unique and entertaining learning experience.

Durable board book format – Designed with tiny hands in mind, perfect for everyday use at home, school, or daycare.
Part of the 100 First Concepts Series - Collect all six titles to introduce your child to food items, animals, birds, vehicles, and more.

Whether it's a gift for a curious toddler or a learning tool for a preschool classroom, 100 Numbers to Count is a must-have addition to any early learning library.

ABC Series

Whether you're delving into the mysteries of science, the wonders of nature, or the beauty of art, the ABC series ensures that learning is not just educational but also profoundly engaging. Perfect for young minds and seasoned readers alike, these books are a testament to the joy of lifelong learning.

description: "Cranky Crab Finds a Home"" tells the heartwarming story of a grumpy little hermit crab who feels squished and lonely in his small shell. As he turns away his friends and hides from the beautiful ocean world, his concerned companions embark on a quest to find him a new, spacious home. With determination and teamwork, they discover the perfect shell, leading to a transformation in the cranky crab. Filled with gratitude and newfound happiness, he learns the importance of kindness and friendship, making a vow to stay friendly and warm-hearted forever. This enchanting tale teaches young readers about the power of compassion and the joy of helping others."

name: Nature Rhymes Board Book
description:
Nature Rhymes invites young readers to explore the beauty of the outdoors through playful verse and bright illustrations. This hardback collection is perfect for children ages 3–7 who love learning about rivers, forests, beaches, and mountains, and the tone is wondrous, comforting, and adventurous.

Written in playful rhymes paired with lush illustrations, Nature Rhymes guides little explorers from sunlit rivers to starlit nights. The book unfolds page by page with a steady cadence that invites reading aloud, while short, nature-centered verses spark questions and curiosity. Each spread introduces a new scene—birds in a forest, sparkling snow, the whisper of wind, the vast night sky—encouraging observation and conversation without spoiling the journey.

After turning the last page, readers carry a refreshed sense of wonder for the natural world and a habit of looking closely at the world around them. Nature Rhymes inspires ongoing exploration, questions, and appreciation for nature’s rhythms, creating memories that last.

Engaging nature rhymes that invite reading aloud
Bright, immersive illustrations that jump off the page
Encourages curiosity and exploration of the natural world
Ideal for parents, educators, and budding nature lovers
A durable hardback format—perfect for little explorers

After turning the last page, readers carry a refreshed sense of wonder for the natural world and a habit of looking closely at the world around them. Nature Rhymes inspires ongoing exploration, questions, and appreciation for nature’s rhythms, creating memories that last.

name: One Hundred Illustrated Stories Book
description: A beautifully ilustrated collection of one hundred of the best-loved stories ever told, from Grimm's Fairytales to Aesop's Fables and Arthurian Legends. Perfect for parents to read to younger children, or for older children who can discover the wonder and magic of these classic tales for themselves.

name: Panchatantra Story Book for Children
description: The timeless stories of Panchatantra have enchanted and fascinated children of the world for many years. Packed with more than 60 of the best stories from Panchatantra and 150 bright and colourful illustrations, this collection of enduring moral stories is an essential addition to every child’s little library. The classic characters in these stories have been brought to life using simple language and attractive illustrations, making Panchatantra for Children a must-have, must-read book for all children.

name: Panda (Proud Parents)-Pam Adams
description:
Panda (Proud Parents)-Pam Adams
A fantastic introduction to non-fiction, which gives the child a glimpse of the life of an animal parent in their natural habitat, together with the experience of the animal baby growing up in the wild. This unique format has a small board book nestling snugly inside a larger book.

name: Peekaboo - Touch and feel book
description: The award-winning, best-selling baby touch series is back with a sleek and playful design. Completely re-illustrated, with updated text and a contemporary new feel, each book's touch-and-feel areas stimulate a baby's developing senses while encouraging interaction and play between parent and child. With large touch-and-feels, bright pictures and gentle, baby-friendly text, this series will stimulate growing minds and active senses from birth Upwards.

name: Peppa Pig: Marvellous Magnet Book
description: It is important to introduce small children to the world of books. But toddlers are difficult to deal with as they cannot be rationalised. Hence, we must be careful in exposing them to a new colourful world. Keeping that in mind, Ladybird Books have come up with an interesting and innovative way of adding fun to the lives of small children by harnessing their imaginative power.

name: Peppa Pig: Peppa & Family
description: Come along and meet Peppa's family! Peppa loves spending time with everyone in her family - it's always so much fun. Come along and meet Granny Pig, Uncle Pig, Baby Alexander and many more! This colourful board book with chunky tabs is perfect for Peppa's biggest fans.

name: Peppa Pig: Peppa and Friends Book
description: Meet Peppa's friends! Peppa has lots of friends! She has some old friends and some new ones, too. Meet Suzy Sheep, Danny Dog, Rebecca Rabbit, Mandy Mouse, Pedro Pony, Gerald Giraffe and George in this bright and colourful board book with 7 tabs!

name: Peppa Pig: Peppa and Friends Magnet Book
description: Can you use your imagination and storytelling skills to help Peppa and her friends have lots of fun adventures? Make up your own stories again and again by placing the magnets of Peppa, her family and friends on these fun magnetic scenes! The perfect activity book for little ones reading at home. The Peppa Pig range of books are fun, interactive and educational, ideal for encouraging children to start to read by themselves.

name: Pet Party- AR Book
description: These cute pets may look normal, but they leap out of the page when you scan them with the free HoloToyz app! Learn more about goldfish, bunnies, dalmatians, and more!

name: Playbook - Touch and Feel Book
description: Playbook - Touch and Feel Book: This toy is designed to engage and develop essential skills in kids. At Toyflix , we make it easy to rent this toy with doorstep delivery and affordable pricing. Rent Playbook - Touch and Feel Book now and give your child a fun and educational playtime. Playbook - Touch and Feel Book is designed to support creativity, improve motor skills, and encourage interactive play. This toy helps children develop essential thinking and social skills in a fun and engaging way. Parents can rest assured as the materials used are safe, durable, and suitable for kids. It promotes creative play, allowing children to explore different ways to use it, thereby enhancing problem-solving abilities. The toy is perfect for indoor as well as outdoor use, making it flexible for various play settings. name: Princess Fairy Tales Books
description: The amazing box containing a set of 10 beautiful fairy tales will be a delightful read for your little princess. Each fairy tales selected in this set has been retold for centuries. The vibrant, captivating illustration shall Spark their imagination, develop speech and language skills. Titles in the series are Cinderella, beauty and the Beast, snow White and the seven dwarfs, Rapunzel, little Red Riding Hood, little mermaid, Hansel and Gretel, Thumbelina, Goldilocks and sleeping beauty.

name: Push & Pull Board Book - My First Day At School
description: My First Day At The School Push & Pull Book is a cheerful, interactive board book that follows a little learner as they discover a new school day. Aimed at children ages 2 and up, this gentle, comforting title blends a clear, kid-friendly story with a delightful push-and-pull design that invites little hands to join the journey, making the start of school feel exciting and doable.

name: Push & Pull Board Book Visit to the zoo
description: Embark on a delightful day at the zoo with this colourful and interactive Push & Pull Board Book! Specially designed for toddlers aged 2 and above, each page features exciting sliding and pulling tabs that bring animals to life. Whether it's a monkey swinging or a lion roaring, your little one will love exploring this sturdy board book while learning about their favourite zoo creatures. Perfect for tiny hands, the durable BB material ensures long-lasting use and safe play. A must-have addition to any early learning library!

name: Rainbow - Touch and Feel book
description: Explore a world of rainbow colours with your baby! This bright board book is the perfect first colours book to encourage babies as they grow and develop. Each sturdy board page is shaped to help little hands grasp the pages and helps to teach a different colour of the rainbow. This beautiful book is full of textured patches to touch, feel and explore, from a shiny red tractor and a fluffy orange cat, to a soft yellow duck and shimmering blue rocket. The high-contrast colours and touch-and-feels encourage interaction and stimulate a baby's senses.

name: READ IT YOURSELF LEVEL 2
description: Read it Yourself is a series of character stories and traditional tales, written in a simple way for children who are learning to read. This box contains ten graded storybooks from Level 2. It is perfect for children who can read short, simple sentences with help.

name: READ IT YOURSELF LEVEL 2
description: Read it Yourself is a series of character stories and traditional tales, written in a simple way for children who are learning to read. This box contains ten graded storybooks from Level 2. It is perfect for children who can read short, simple sentences with help.

name: Rory and His Alien Friend Bobo
description:
Engaging Storyline: Rory’s encounter with Bobo, a lost alien, makes the concept of kindness tangible and exciting for young minds.
Life Skills Focus: Teaches kindness as a fundamental life skill that helps children build friendship and develop empathy.
Vibrant Illustrations: Colorful, lively images enhance understanding and keep children fully engaged.
Relatable & Simple: Easy-to-follow language and scenarios that children can easily relate to.
Part of the Life Skills Series: A collection of stories aimed at nurturing emotional intelligence and social skills in early learners.
This book is a wonderful tool for parents, educators, and caregivers who want to inspire kindness and empathy in children, making learning these important skills both fun and meaningful.

name: Seasons - Touch and Feel book
description: Introduce your baby to all of the seasons with this bright, interactive playbook. Say hello to spring, summer, autumn and winter, from fluffy chicks to sparkly snowflakes! With textured patches to touch, feel and explore, this bright and sturdy board book with grabbable tabs will engage young children from birth upwards. High-contrast colours and touch-and-feels stimulate a baby's senses, while encouraging interaction and play. A perfect first words book for all babies and toddlers. Sensory development Boosts motor skills

name: sleeping beauty
description: "Sleeping Beauty"" enchants young readers with captivating pop-up illustrations. Each page unfolds to reveal scenes from the timeless fairy tale, from the enchanted forest to the majestic castle. Vibrant colors and intricate details bring the story to life, sparking imagination and wonder in young minds. As readers follow Sleeping Beauty's journey, they're immersed in a world of magic and adventure. This interactive book not only entertains but also fosters cognitive development and a love for storytelling. It's a cherished addition to any child's library, promising endless enchantment with each page turn."

name: Snow White And The Seven Dwarfs
description: "Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs"" enchants young readers with its captivating pop-up illustrations. Each page unfolds to reveal scenes from the timeless fairy tale, from the enchanted forest to the cozy cottage of the Seven Dwarfs. Vibrant colors and intricate details bring the story to life, immersing children in a world of magic and wonder. As they follow Snow White's journey, encountering the wicked queen and her poisoned apple, readers are drawn into a tale of bravery, friendship, and true love. This interactive book sparks imagination and fosters a love for storytelling in young minds."

name: Special Tiger Book
description: The special tiger is a tale from the time when the jungle was still very young and a tiger therein did not have stripes! What caused his stripes to go? The story is about a 'special' Tiger which is delightfully told, while the shapes are vivid with bold colours.

name: Spot and Learn with Pictures: People We Meet
description:
Get ready to spot, discover, and learn with these engaging books.

Equip your little scholars with -

Sensory skills
Reading and speaking skills
Robust vocabulary through picture-word association
A specially designed book to help children develop visual perception, offering a unique and entertaining learning experience.

This book will help the little ones learn about the different types of jobs people do. Each spread features different people and different professions to look for and learn about.

The book is a part of Spot and Learn with Pictures series which is a set of five books to introduce key concepts to little ones in an interactive and engaging manner. Every single illustrated spread in these books features a variety of things to look for and learn about. Each book contains distinct vibrant illustrations to help children develop observation, reading and word-picture association skills.

name: Super Sea creatures- AR Book
description: Deep sea creatures in this interactive book will come to life in breath-taking 3D animation to charm and teach your child about dolphins, sea turtles , orca whales and more!

name: Super Space Explore Inside
description: Have you ever wondered about what goes on in deep space? Or how our planet came into existence? An educational discovery book with easy-to-lift flaps revealing exciting information about various topics, perfect for curious young learners. This interactive learning book: Makes learning fun through discovery Covers comprehensive educational topics Features sturdy, easy-lift flaps Includes detailed facts and information Perfect for inquisitive minds and gifting

name: test
description: test

name: The Biggest Dinosaur Story Book
description: Dinosaurs areBIG-yes- but how big? Bigger than an elephant, taller than a giraffe or longer than a snake?! It is about the time when a real big dinosaur lived in the jungle. Was he nice with other animals? The story is delightfully told, while the shapes are vivid with bold colours. The book is a perfect mix of fun and kid-friendly learning for your child.

name: The Colourful Penguin Book
description: The penguin Nanu's world is monochromatic and boring. Either the white snow or the sky in its typical hues. Her colours-craving eyes motivate her into a journey which awaits her with colourful surprises. The story is delightfully told, while the shapes are vivid with bold colours. The book is a perfect mix of fun and kid-friendly learning for your child.

name: The Fluffiest Rabbit Story Book
description: The rabbit Ford has only received scornful jealousy from his two brothers because of his magnificent fur that makes him look different than the two. Find out how Ford's true love wins his brothers back! The story is delightfully told, while the shapes are vivid with bold colours. The book is a perfect mix of fun and kid-friendly learning for your child.

name: The Hare & The Tortoise Book
description: One of the most favourite children’s story, The Hare and The Tortoise tells how a slow tortoise could win the race by defeating a fast and boastful hare.

name: THE HUNT FOR THE GOLDEN BOOK
description: If your little one loves to read books which are full of adventures and excitement, then 'Geronimo Stilton - The Hunt for the Golden Book’ is just the right book for them. Geronimo Stilton is one of the most popular characters of children books. Kids have always shown a lot of interest in going on a ride full of mystery and adventures with him. This book has continued the legacy of bringing some of the most adventurous stories for kids. In the book, protagonist Geronimo Stilton is celebrating 10 years of success in the field of writing. He wishes to celebrate his success by writing his story and publishing it as a book. But some things are not destined to happen smoothly. How is he going to type and publish his book when his precious laptop is not with him anymore? It has been stolen somewhere and nowhere to be found now. Go through the exciting tale of this laptop search and his zest to write and publish his success story. Kids will be thrilled as adventure is not just limited to the hunt of the Golden book. This edition has a lot more to offer and keep you engaged. You get an extra surprise story of the lake monster in this edition. The Lake Monster is again a tale full of energy, excitement, conspiracies and lot of secrets. When people of Mouse Island saw a monster in the lake, they were terrified at first, but then they grew suspicions. They asked Geronimo Stilton to investigate the entire case and resolve the mystery of the monster. Little did they know that the mystery will reveal many secrets of the creature? Large number of jokes will give you a good laugh during entire reading. About the author Italian author Elisabetta Dami is one of the most famous children's fiction writers. Born in Milan, she has been writing since the age of 18. She collaborates with Piemme Publishing house for her books. Till date, she has authored more than 100 books and has seen 100 million copies of her books sold all across the world. Geronimo Stilton is her most famous character. The book is available online for convenient shopping. You can bag this book from A today by following a few easy steps.

name: The Lion and the Mouse
description: "The Lion and the Mouse"" is a captivating board book tailored for young readers. Its unique shape and sturdy board pages make it perfect for little hands. Through vibrant illustrations and concise storytelling, Aesop's classic fable unfolds, following the unlikely friendship between a mighty lion and a tiny mouse. Children are drawn into the tale, learning valuable lessons about kindness, bravery, and the power of helping others, regardless of size. As they journey through the pages, they discover the importance of compassion and gratitude. This charming book entertains while imparting timeless moral values, leaving a lasting impression on young minds"

name: The Smelly Search
description:
For cavemouse Geronimo Stiltonoot, life is one prehistoric problem after another!
Geronimo Stiltonoot and friends have been invited to participate in a Stone Age treasure hunt! How fun! The one issue is that it has been set up by Gossip Radio host Sally Rockmousen, Geronimo's rival. Is it some sort of trick? The hunt is full of difficult riddles and very stinky dinosaurs... but nothing will stop Geronimo's team!

name: The Thirsty Crow
description: "The Thirsty Crow"" is an engaging board book crafted for young readers. Its unique shape and sturdy board pages make it easy for little hands to hold and explore. Through vibrant illustrations and concise storytelling, Aesop's timeless fable comes to life. Children follow the clever crow's quest for water, facing challenges along the way. With each turn of the page, they learn valuable lessons about problem-solving, determination, and ingenuity. This charming book not only entertains but also imparts essential moral values, sparking imagination and fostering a love for reading in young hearts. It's a treasure for any child's library."

name: Touch & Feel Board Book Colours
description:
🎨 Sensory Exploration of Red, Blue, Yellow & More to Boost Early Color Recognition

"Colours Touch and Feel Board Book for Children" Invites Little Ones on a Vibrant Sensory Journey Through the World of Colors! Each Page Features a Bold New Hue - Like the Soft Red of an Apple, the Shiny Blue of a Ball, or the Fuzzy Yellow of a Duck - Brought to Life with Textures That Spark Exploration and Excitement. with Every Touch, Children Learn to Associate Colors with Everyday Objects in a Fun and Interactive Way.

This Engaging Board Book Supports Early Development by Combining Tactile Play with Color Recognition, Helping Little Hands Learners Connect What They See with What They Feel. from Smooth to Fluffy, Bumpy to Silky, Each Texture Encourages Hands - On Discovery and Keeps Curious Minds Engaged. as Children Explore Red, Blue, Yellow, and More, They Begin to Understand the Basics of Colors Through Play, Making Learning Both Meaningful and Memorable.

🎨 Touch, Feel, and Learn Colours - With Interactive Textures and Simple Words

Premium Quality Design with Durable Board Pages
Sturdy Board Pages & Kids-Friendly Design
Learn Colours Through Touch
Introduce Basic Colours
Interactive Touch-and-Hear Fun
Supports Early Learning
Fun Way to Learn Through Play
Boosts Early Vocabulary Skills
Vibrant and Engaging Illustrations
Perfect for Little Hands & Gift Book

name: Touch & Feel Board Book Numbers
description:
Make early number learning exciting with the Touch & Feel – Numbers board book by Pegasus. This interactive padded book helps toddlers recognize numbers through colorful illustrations and textured elements on every page. By combining visual learning with sensory play, it builds a strong foundation for early math skills while keeping little ones engaged through touch and exploration.

Key Features
Interactive Learning: Features tactile textures that make number recognition more engaging.
Early Math Skills: Introduces counting and number awareness in a fun, hands-on way.
Durable Design: Padded board book built to withstand toddler handling.
Large Format: 24 cm × 21.5 cm for easy viewing and interaction.
Age Suitability: Ideal for children 12 months and above.
Skill Development: Supports tactile stimulation, sensory growth, motor skills, and language development.
Read Less

name: Touch & Feel Board Book Shapes and Sizes
description:
Designed specially for toddlers and preschoolers, this interactive learning book helps children explore different shapes and objects through engaging touch-and-feel textures.
With colorful illustrations, fun activities, and sensory elements, this book encourages early brain development, tactile learning, and fine motor skills. Perfect for curious little hands, it makes learning shapes and sizes a joyful and hands-on experience.
An ideal gift for kids, this educational book supports sensory development, interactive play, and early learning at home or preschool.
Key Features:
Interactive touch & feel textures for sensory learning
Bright and colorful illustrations to grab attention
Teaches shapes, sizes, and object recognition
